name: Appendix i: Wizard Spells by School
raw_text:
Appendix i: Wizard Spells by School
Boldfaced spells are described in the
Tome of Magic rule book. The remainder are found in the AD&D® 2nd Edition Player's Handbook.
Italicized spells are reversible. The reverse name follows the slash.
An asterisk (*) indicates a Wild Magic
spell.

Alarm (1st)
Cantrip (1st)
Protection From Evil/Protection From
Good (1st)

Radius/
